title: Rafael's Loot Bundles
description: This mod adds Loot Bundles that give players random loot from the entire game. It’s perfect for adding surprise rewards and variety to your Minecraft world!
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c22f6583731bfa0deeb3e2155acd247602c55ce1.gif)
---
**Version:** 0.6
**Versions:** 1.21.x  
**Mod Loader**: Fabric

---
## Description

Rafael's Loot Bundles adds a fun, randomized loot system to Minecraft! With this mod, players can use loot bundles that yield random items when opened, ranging from common blocks to rare treasures.

## ‼️ Note ‼️
Every Monday i will update mod with new Mob Loot Bundle.

## **Ore Loot Bundles**
### Get loot bundles based on ore you mine.

![Ore Loot Bundles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/37fe7f931b250a5467d7da365e2b3e9b377851e5.png)

## **Mob Loot Bundles**
Get loot bundles based on mob you defeated.

![Hostile Mob Loot Bundles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23de31c56beea7f374eb145ed1ef82ea6fa76585.png)

![Neutral Mob Loot Bundles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e17d036013b21912788bc4f40591a60f7fa5dd70.png)

![Passive Mob Loot Bundles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d8cf07ca2f99bcfa6e180867ff1bdefda158077.png)

## **Rarity Loot Bundles**
Get loot bundles on 5 different category.

![Rarity Loot Bundles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9310ca3476ab7b63a814c9bc13371938f069f87c.png)

## Randomized Loot
Every loot bundle contains a selection of random items. Discover new items with each bundle you open!

## Total of 30 Different Bundles
![All Bundles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa31a6da43f149d47c6e37e6d7adc05b248d42a2.png)
---
## Usage

Right-click with the loot bundle in your hand to open it and receive random items!

---

## Support

Found an issue or have a suggestion? Please submit it on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/rafaelmehdiyev/Loot-Bundles-Mod/issues).

Happy looting! 🎉
